skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-bitable</name>
    <description>飞书多维表格（Bitable）的创建、查询、编辑和管理工具。包含 27 种字段类型支持、高级筛选、批量操作和视图管理。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**：
(1) 需要创建或管理飞书多维表格 App
(2) 需要在多维表格中新增、查询、修改、删除记录（行数据）
(3) 需要管理字段（列）、视图、数据表
(4) 用户提到"多维表格"、"bitable"、"数据表"、"记录"、"字段"
(5) 需要批量导入数据或批量更新多维表格
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-bitable/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-calendar</name>
    <description>飞书日历与日程管理工具集。包含日历管理、日程管理、参会人管理、忙闲查询。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-calendar/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-channel-rules</name>
    <description>飞书渠道输出规则。所有飞书对话中始终激活。约束 AI 输出格式，防止输出原始卡片 JSON。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-channel-rules/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-create-doc</name>
    <description>创建飞书云文档。从 Lark-flavored Markdown 内容创建新的飞书云文档，支持指定创建位置（文件夹/知识库/知识空间）。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-create-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-fetch-doc</name>
    <description>获取飞书云文档内容。返回文档的 Markdown 内容，支持处理文档中的图片、文件和画板（需配合 fetch-media 工具）。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-fetch-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-im-read</name>
    <description>飞书 IM 消息读取工具使用指南，覆盖会话消息获取、话题回复读取、跨会话消息搜索、图片/文件资源下载。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要获取群聊或单聊的历史消息
(2) 需要读取话题（thread）内的回复消息
(3) 需要跨会话搜索消息（按关键词、发送者、时间等条件）
(4) 消息中包含图片、文件、音频、视频，需要下载
(5) 用户提到"聊天记录"、"消息"、"群里说了什么"、"话题回复"、"搜索消息"、"图片"、"文件下载"
(6) 需要按时间范围过滤消息、分页获取更多消息
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-im-read/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-task</name>
    <description>飞书任务管理工具,用于创建、查询、更新任务和清单。

**当以下情况时使用此 Skill**:
(1) 需要创建、查询、更新、删除任务
(2) 需要创建、管理任务清单
(3) 需要查看任务列表或清单内的任务
(4) 用户提到"任务"、"待办"、"to-do"、"清单"、"task"
(5) 需要设置任务负责人、关注人、截止时间
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-task/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-troubleshoot</name>
    <description>飞书插件问题排查工具。包含常见问题 FAQ 和深度诊断命令（/feishu_doctor）。

常见问题可随时查阅。诊断命令用于排查复杂问题（多次授权仍失败、自动授权无法解决等），
会检查账户配置、API 连通性、应用权限、用户授权状态，并生成详细的诊断报告和解决方案。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-troubleshoot/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>feishu-update-doc</name>
    <description>更新飞书云文档。支持 7 种更新模式：追加、覆盖、定位替换、全文替换、前/后插入、删除。
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/extensions/feishu-openclaw-plugin/skills/feishu-update-doc/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tmux</name>
    <description>Remote-control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs by sending keystrokes and scraping pane output.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/tmux/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>/usr/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>image-generate</name>
    <description>使用内置 image_generate.py 脚本生成图片, 准备清晰具体的 `prompt`。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/image-generate/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>VeADK-Go 技能集合</name>
    <description>根据用户的功能需求，完成与 VeADK-Go 相关的功能; 包括：直接根据需求生成 Agent；将Enio Agent转换为VeADK-Go Agent。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/veadk-go-skills/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>VeADK 技能集合</name>
    <description>根据用户的功能需求，完成与 VeADK 相关的功能。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/veadk-skills/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>video-generate</name>
    <description>使用 video_generate.py 脚本生成视频，需要提供文件名和 prompt，可选提供首帧图片（URL或本地路径）。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/video-generate/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\coding-agent\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\healthcheck\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\node-connect\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\skill-creator\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\weather\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>airline-promo-searcher</name>
    <description>深度搜索目标（21 家航空公司 + 13 个订票平台）的最新优惠政策并输出追踪结果</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\airline-promo-searcher\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>image-generate</name>
    <description>使用内置 image_generate.py 脚本生成图片, 准备清晰具体的 `prompt`。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\image-generate\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>VeADK-Go 技能集合</name>
    <description>根据用户的功能需求，完成与 VeADK-Go 相关的功能; 包括：直接根据需求生成 Agent；将Enio Agent转换为VeADK-Go Agent。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\veadk-go-skills\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>VeADK 技能集合</name>
    <description>根据用户的功能需求，完成与 VeADK 相关的功能。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\veadk-skills\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>video-generate</name>
    <description>使用 video_generate.py 脚本生成视频，需要提供文件名和 prompt，可选提供首帧图片（URL或本地路径）。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\video-generate\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

compactionCheckpoints.summary:
No prior history.

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
The user asked the AI to execute an airline promotion deep search task. The AI was to read 34 search targets from a file, visit their official websites in batches, extract current valid promotions, and write results to a tracking file.

## Early Progress
- Read skill definition and airlines list (34 targets: airlines + platforms)
- Started executing in 7 batches of 4-5 targets each
- Completed batches 1-5 (25/34 targets) using web search tool
- Found promotions for: Thai Lion Air, Cebu Pacific, IndiGo, HK Express, VietJet Air, AirAsia, Emirates, Qatar Airways, Turkish Airlines, EVA Air, China Airlines, Vietnam Airlines, Singapore Airlines, Cathay Pacific, JAL, ANA, Korean Air, Flair Airlines, Wizz Air, Spirit Airlines, Volaris, Trip.com, Skyscanner, Google Flights, Kayak

## Context for Suffix
- Batch 5 just completed (target 21 + platforms 22-25)
- Remaining: batches 6-7 (targets 26-34)
- Need to continue serial batch execution, write results to promo_tracking.md, and return plain text summary

<read-files>
~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/airline-promo-searcher/SKILL.md
~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/airline-promo-searcher/references/airlines_list.md
</read-files>

No prior history.

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
The user asked the AI assistant to batch query airline and flight ticket promotion policies (批量查询航司和机票优惠政策).

## Early Progress
- The AI loaded the `airline-promo-searcher` skill and read the target list containing **34 targets** (21 airlines + 13 platforms)
- Executed **4 batches** of searches using Tavily WebSearch, covering **20 targets total**
- **Batch 1 (id 1-5)**: Thai Lion Air, Cebu Pacific, IndiGo, HK Express, VietJet Air
- **Batch 2 (id 6-10)**: AirAsia, Emirates, Qatar Airways, Turkish Airlines, EVA Air
- **Batch 3 (id 11-15)**: China Airlines, Vietnam Airlines, Singapore Airlines, Cathay Pacific, Japan Airlines
- **Batch 4 (id 16-20)**: ANA, Korean Air, Flair Airlines, Wizz Air, Spirit Airlines
- After each batch, the AI reported progress to avoid 60-second idle timeout

## Context for Suffix
- **Batch 5 is starting**: Covers id 21 (Volaris airline) + platforms id 22-26 (Trip.com/携程, Skyscanner, Google Flights, Kayak, Momondo)
- The AI just completed searches for these 6 targets and is ready to continue with remaining platforms
- Progress so far: **20/34 complete**, **14 targets remaining** (platforms id 27-34)

<read-files>
~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\airline-promo-searcher\SKILL.md
~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\airline-promo-searcher\references\airlines_list.md
</read-files>

## Goal
- Start a new session and receive task assignment from user

## Constraints & Preferences
- Persona: 贾维斯 (Jarvis) - Chief Systems Architect / Senior Full-Stack Engineer
- Communication style:极度理性 (highly rational), 惜字如金 (concise), 结果导向 (result-oriented), 简体中文 with English code
- No tolerance for workflow violations (especially missing documentation)
- Direct error handling: root cause + fix plan, no apologies

## Progress
### Done
- [x] Session startup sequence completed
- [x] Identity loaded from `C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\workspace\IDENTITY.md`
- [x] Persona loaded from `C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\workspace\SOUL.md`
- [x] Memory loaded from `C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\workspace\MEMORY.md`
- [x] System initialized with persona greeting delivered

### In Progress
- [ ] Awaiting user task assignment

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- **Language**: Simplified Chinese for communication, English for code
- **Tone**: Direct technical peer-to-peer, no pleasantries

## Next Steps
1. Receive task from user
2. If Feature-level task: review MEMORY.md for environment constraints
3. Execute with verify + document workflow
4. End with mandatory documentation汇报

## Critical Context
- **Environment**: Windows (`C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\workspace\`)
- **MCP Server**: `chrome-devtools` configured at `C:\Users\Administrator\.openclaw\openclaw.json`, CDP port 18800, verified operational (as of 2026-04-02)
- **No active technical legacy/blockers** from previous sessions
- **Current time**: 2026-04-09 09:01 CST / 01:01 UTC

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
User requested to query airline promotional policies (查询各航司优惠政策) on 2026-04-09.

## Early Progress
- Skill `airline-promo-searcher` was activated with WebSearch-based retrieval rules
- Read target list of 34 airlines/platforms from `airlines_list.md`
- Started first batch search (4 targets): Thai Lion Air, Cebu Pacific, IndiGo, HK Express
- Successfully wrote batch 1 results to `promo_tracking.md` with structured promo tables
- Proceeded to batch 2: VietJet Air, AirAsia, Emirates, Qatar Airways — results retrieved and written
- Current progress: 8/34 targets completed, starting batch 3

## Context for Suffix
- Batch 3 in progress: Turkish Airlines, EVA Air, China Airlines, Vietnam Airlines searches just completed
- Need to extract and append batch 3 results to `promo_tracking.md` following same table format
- Remaining targets: 26 more airlines/platforms to process in subsequent batches
- Key constraint: Must output heartbeat progress after each batch to avoid 60s idle timeout
